name: Arugula Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wooden salad bowl, rub the peeled garlic and salt into the bottom to season it.
2. Combine 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, and 1/3 cup olive oil in a small bowl. Stir until well mixed.
3. Tear the mixed lettuce leaves and arugula into bite-sized pieces.
4. Add the sliced mushrooms and sweet red pepper to the salad mixture.
5. Toss the ingredients together gently until evenly distributed.
6. Serve immediately.
